let D : InternalTangentSpace x →ₗ[ℝ] X :=
    Submodule.liftQ _ (DirectSum.toModule ℝ _ _ (fun p ↦
      let ⟨E, _, _, f, L, hf, hp⟩ := (is_fine (x := X)).1 p.2.1
      L ∘ₗ (fderiv ℝ f 0))) (by
        rw [Submodule.span_le]; rintro _ ⟨p, q, f, w, rfl⟩
        simp only [LinearMap.mem_ker, map_sub, toModule_lof, sub_eq_zero]
        let ⟨Eₚ, _, _, fₚ, Lₚ, hfₚ, hpₚ⟩ := (is_fine (x := X)).1 p.2.1
        let ⟨E_q, _, _, f_q, L_q, hf_q, hp_q⟩ := (is_fine (x := X)).1 q.2.1
        have : Lₚ ∘ fₚ = (L_q ∘ f_q) ∘ f := by rw [← hp_q, ← hpₚ]; exact p.1.2_eq_q_1.2_comp_f
        have : Lₚ ∘ₗ (fderiv ℝ fₚ 0) = L_q ∘ₗ (fderiv ℝ f_q 0 ∘ₗ fderiv ℝ f 0) := by
          -- This follows from the chain rule and the property of fine diffeologies
          sorry
        exact LinearMap.congr_fun this w)
  have h_eq := LinearMap.congr_arg h D
  simp only [D, Submodule.liftQ_apply, toModule_lof, LinearMap.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply] at h_eq
  convert h_eq <;> {

let Φ' : PreInternalTangentSpace x →ₗ[ℝ] X := toModule ℝ (pointedPlots x) X (fun p ↦ fderiv ℝ p.1.2 0)
  let Φ : InternalTangentSpace x →ₗ[ℝ] X := Submodule.liftQ _ Φ' (by
    intro v hv
    rcases hv with ⟨p, q, f, w, rfl⟩
    simp only [Φ', toModule_lof]
    rw [f.2.fderiv, fderiv_comp (q.2.1.dsmooth.contDiff 0) (f.2.dsmooth.contDiff 0), p.2.2])
  have h_ev (u : X) : Φ (InternalTangentSpace.lof ⟨⟨1, fun t ↦ x + t 0 • u⟩,
    ((dsmooth_add_left x).comp (dsmooth_smul.comp (DSmooth.prod_mk (proj (0 : Fin 1)).dsmooth dsmooth_const))).isPlot, by simp⟩ (EuclideanSpace.single 0 1)) = u := by
    simp [InternalTangentSpace.lof, Submodule.liftQ_apply, Φ', toModule_lof, fderiv_add_left, fderiv_smul_const]
    rfl
  exact (h_ev v).symm.trans ((congr_arg Φ h).trans (h_ev w))

let L : InternalTangentSpace x →ₗ[ℝ] X := Submodule.liftQ _ (DirectSum.toModule ℝ _ _ fun p ↦ IsFineDiffeology.fderiv p.1.2 0) (by
    rintro _ ⟨p, q, f, w, rfl⟩; simp; exact IsFineDiffeology.fderiv_comp q.1.2 f.1.2 0 w)
  exact (by simpa [vectorSpaceToInternalTangentSpace, L, IsFineDiffeology.fderiv_path] using congr_arg L h)
zero_ne_one this.symm
exact h
exact (hφ v).symm.trans ((congr_arg φ h).trans (hφ w))

exact hΦ

  let φ := (Basis.ofVectorSpace ℝ X).repr · i

      intro v hv; obtain ⟨p, q, f, w, rfl⟩ := hv
      simp only [LinearMap.coe_toContinuousLinearMap, map_sub, DirectSum.toModule_lof, LinearMap.sub_apply]
      rw [← fderiv_comp 0 (φ.dsmooth.comp q.2.1.dsmooth).contDiff.differentiableAt (le_refl 1)
        f.2.contDiff.differentiableAt (le_refl 1), Function.comp_assoc]; rfl)
  exact (congr_arg T h).trans (by simp [T, φ])
exact (InternalTangentSpace.linearization x).injective h
